title: ESP32
comment2: We BUILD the per-chip static target xtensa-esp32-elf (esp32 config baked in via the overlay, no dynconfig plugin — a static wasm build can't dlopen one). arduino-esp32 3.1.1 ships the UNIFIED xtensa-esp-elf (dynconfig) toolchain, so the harvest wraps that nativeTarget; gcc 13.2.0_20240530 matches the core for ABI parity.
comment: ESP32 classic is Xtensa LX6. Needs the Espressif gcc fork + the esp32 xtensa-overlay (XTENSA_GNU_CONFIG) — upstream gcc has no esp32 config. Built per-target (Xtensa cannot share the RISC-V/ARM cc1plus.wasm).
